description: Style NotePared down to the basics, this kurta from alma is just right for a layered boho chic or a simple off-to-college vibe. Add a splash of colourful jewellery for an interesting dimension. The simple silhouette and the minimal design details will balance the brighter accessories. Product DetailsRed sleeveless printed kurta with no side slits, has round neck with binding around the neck and arm opening, has three decorative tucks above the hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
